title: Neostachyanthus
taxonomy: Neostachyanthus belongs to the family Loganiaceae. It is a genus of flowering plants. Neostachyanthus species are native to tropical Africa. The classification of Neostachyanthus is part of the larger order Gentianales. Neostachyanthus species are known for their unique, fragrant flowers.

intro: Neostachyanthus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Loranthaceae, commonly known as mistletoe. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its purported health benefits such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
